track_record.frame_line: Observational — settlement tracking; registered verdict metrics govern.
track_record.visibility_markdown:
## M-1 Outcomes

Observational — settlement tracking; registered verdict metric is excess CLV.
Outcome denominator basis: PA-valid settled player-market rows only; zero-PA and absent-boxscore rows are VOID.
Retroactive-grading note: CLV sign is rendered from captured closes where available; this is report visibility only.

### 2026-07-16 settlements

| Market | Picks | Hits | Hit rate | Avg implied prob at pick |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Doubles | 2 | 0 | 0.0% | 17.2% |
| Hits | 5 | 2 | 40.0% | 63.3% |
| Total bases | 3 | 1 | 33.3% | 43.2% |

HR subgroup (secondary only; no HR-specific verdict): matched-close coverage=0/0 (n/a); unmatched=0.

Scorable-coverage rule (commit b68aade): 0/10 scorable (0.0%); 10 unscorable — mechanical capture miss, not a chosen exclusion. Reason: Dedicated close capture missed a prospective schedule change and produced no valid pre-first-pitch close rows. Outcomes settle normally; these rows are excluded from excess-CLV and CLV-sign tables; pick-day 11 remains banked.

#### CLV-sign split

CLV sign: unavailable — no matched close rows yet.

### Cumulative M-1 outcomes through 2026-07-16

| Market | Picks | Hits | Hit rate | Avg implied prob at pick |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Doubles | 448 | 65 | 14.5% | 18.7% |
| Hits | 577 | 311 | 53.9% | 57.5% |
| HR | 345 | 47 | 13.6% | 14.8% |
| Total bases | 756 | 301 | 39.8% | 45.2% |

HR subgroup (secondary only; no HR-specific verdict): matched-close coverage=310/345 (89.9%); unmatched=35.

#### Cumulative CLV-sign split

| Market | CLV bucket | Picks | Hits | Hit rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Doubles | negative/flat CLV | 256 | 35 | 13.7% |
| Doubles | positive CLV | 139 | 27 | 19.4% |
| Hits | negative/flat CLV | 303 | 156 | 51.5% |
| Hits | positive CLV | 199 | 118 | 59.3% |
| HR | negative/flat CLV | 143 | 12 | 8.4% |
| HR | positive CLV | 167 | 29 | 17.4% |
| Total bases | negative/flat CLV | 406 | 159 | 39.2% |
| Total bases | positive CLV | 274 | 114 | 41.6% |

## Coverage & Shadow

Coverage diagnostics — durability judged over many slates; no single-day disposition decisions.

#### Adaptive Scout — quarantined daily line
